policy.goal: Find legitimate free-tier or local model providers for development workflows.
policy.not_goal: Unlimited token farming, bypassing limits, account automation, or key scraping.
policy.store_secrets: Vault only; never in provider discovery cache.

sources.notes: Public GitHub topic listing free-ai-api repositories. Some entries may advertise bypasses; those must be rejected.
Curated list focused on permanently free LLM APIs with rate limits and no trial-credit framing.

provider_classes.description: Local runtimes such as Ollama/LM Studio. Best for unlimited local development bounded by hardware.
Official free tiers with published rate limits. Use budget and cache.
Gateways exposing OpenAI-compatible APIs. Must be manually vetted for terms and reliability.

reject_if: Claims to bypass a paid service or rate limit.
Requires scraping user sessions, cookies, or web tokens.
No clear terms of service or ownership.
Asks for private keys, Telegram tokens, Vault tokens, or trading credentials.
